title: Emergency Management Director

rationales.taskAutomation: Hazard-mitigation plans, grant paperwork, and resource-tracking are digital, but cross-agency coordination and live crisis leadership are not automatable.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-assisted disaster-modeling and resource-allocation tools are improving but remain niche products, not a standard part of emergency-management toolchains.
rationales.adoption: Emergency management offices are small, government-funded operations that are slow to adopt even proven planning software.
rationales.agenticExposure: Grant and plan drafting is a moderate agent-ownable slice, while live multi-agency crisis coordination stays firmly human.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 11-9161, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Planning paperwork automates readily; the job's value is in the live coordination no model can run during an actual disaster.
